case_title: DORIS JOHNSON VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-02-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.
